headline: Australia and India deepen energy ties covering renewables, critical minerals and uranium
summary_80w: Australia and India have formalised a broadened energy partnership that spans renewable energy deployment, supply chain resilience, critical minerals, rooftop solar training and uranium exports.

headline: US-based BESS companies Peak Energy, ESS Inc and Unigrid aim to commercialise sodium-ion in US, Europe
summary_80w: Peak Energy, ESS Tech Inc, and Unigrid have made recent announcements advancing sodium-ion energy storage technology in the US and Europe.

headline: State of health: The critical metric for measuring battery ageing and performance, and why it matters for BESS

headline: SEC and Energy Dome to deploy 20MW/200MWh compressed CO2 energy storage system in Victoria, Australia
summary_80w: Victoria's State Electricity Commission (SEC) and Italian clean technology company Energy Dome have announced plans to develop the state's first long-duration energy storage (LDES) facility.

summary_80w: A 19.8MWh battery energy storage system (BESS) is to be added to an existing solar-plus-storage facility in the Republic of Palau, with Australian development finance backing the expansion of one of the Western Pacific's flagship hybrid renewable energy projects.

summary_80w: HMC Capital has launched Illuma Energy, a new identity that brings together the ASX-listed asset manager's energy investment, development and operating activities under a single platform.

headline: India adds 26GW solar PV in H1 2026 – JMK Research
summary_80w: India added approximately 26GW of solar capacity and 3GW of wind capacity during the first half of 2026, according to JMK Research.

headline: July polysilicon market weakens further but decline slows
summary_80w: The latest Silicon Industry Branch figures indicate continued weakness in the Chinese polysilicon market this week, though the decline slowed markedly.

headline: Premier Energies moves ahead with 10GW ingot-wafer facility in Andhra Pradesh, India
summary_80w: Premier Energies expects to begin construction of the first phase of its planned 10GW ingot and wafer manufacturing facility in Andhra Pradesh shortly.

headline: What solar asset owners need to know about cybersecurity and NIS2 compliance

headline: India requires major transmission buildout as renewable energy curtailment reaches 33%: ICRA
summary_80w: India's power transmission sector is set for a multi-year investment cycle between FY2027 and FY2032, according to ICRA.

headline: EU’s Chinese inverter ban could affect 14% of future solar demand, Wood Mackenzie says

headline: Europe ROUNDUP: Projects, supply deals and acquisitions spanning north to east by Green Flexibility, Jinko, OX2 and Baltic Storage Platform
